reason: tests.orig passes 18/18 on gold but tests/ (the active test suite) only passes 14/18 even with gold fix applied due to pre-existing bugs: test_repo_mysql_structs_complete and test_columns_zero_initialized_after_alloc use regex patterns with unescaped braces inside f-strings, causing SyntaxError in the subprocess validator. Additionally, the ctrf pytest plugin crashes with AttributeError on the base image's pytest 7.2.1. Since these are test infrastructure problems, not instruction problems, and the tests.orig suite (which passes correctly) validates the same behavior, the active test suite needs rewrite, not the instruction.
